parameters.query:
-- Insert TG call + status PATCH as two queue items (TG first, then PATCH)
INSERT INTO api_queue (queue_type, operation, priority, url, method, body, source_workflow, source_entry_id)
VALUES 
    ('telegram_api', '{{ $json.tgOperation }}', 2,
     '{{ $json.tgUrl }}', 'POST', 
     '{{ $json.tgBody }}'::jsonb,
     'Notifications Hub', '{{ $json.entryId }}'),
    ('memento_api', 'PATCH_NOTIF_STATUS', 4,
     'https://api.mementodatabase.com/v1/libraries/mRERW8SrY/entries/{{ $json.entryId }}?token={{MEMENTO_API_TOKEN}}', 
     'PATCH',
     '{"fields": [{"id": 31, "value": "Odoslané"}]}'::jsonb,
     'Notifications Hub', '{{ $json.entryId }}')
RETURNING id;
